以电影为主，小说为辅，解说《沙丘》作品。因为电影和小说之间存在着些许情节冲突，up主会斟酌在情节上做取舍和融合

[十级学者影视详解](https://m.bilibili.com/topic-detail?topic_id=1321522&topic_name=%E5%8D%81%E7%BA%A7%E5%AD%A6%E8%80%85%E5%BD%B1%E8%A7%86%E8%AF%A6%E8%A7%A3&spm_id_from=333.788.top.function_card.click "十级学者影视详解")

[电影解说](https://search.bilibili.com/all?keyword=%E7%94%B5%E5%BD%B1%E8%A7%A3%E8%AF%B4&from_source=video_tag)

[沙丘解说](https://search.bilibili.com/all?keyword=%E6%B2%99%E4%B8%98%E8%A7%A3%E8%AF%B4&from_source=video_tag)

[沙丘](https://search.bilibili.com/all?keyword=%E6%B2%99%E4%B8%98&from_source=video_tag)
